parentScopeBlock:
# Parent #278 — Phase 2 TikTok (constant for all children)

## Epic deferrals
- T8 router classifier / trained ML inference (T1–T8): Phase 4 only
- VP/AHR dual-read: platform-policy reference — not P2 exit gate
- Marketing API (`business-api.tiktok.com`): out of Shop Partner scope
- Seller Center scraping for health scores: forbidden
- Webhook types outside Phase 2 catalog (~50 types): Phase 3+
- Cloud LLM copy layer: Phase 4
- `web/`, `ios/`: not required for Phase 2 exit

## Merchants
- Fujiwa (`7658073774813611784`): production read-only
- SANDBOX_VN (`7658096633384781588`): sandbox write-validation only

## Data sources
- TikTok Partner API per `docs/architecture/data-sources.md`
- SPS / shop health: Partner API when verified contract exists
- `health_data_source`: `api` | `proxy` | `unavailable` — never fabricate VP/AHR/SPS
- Production sync: Fujiwa polling → ETL → Postgres canonical entities
- Phase 2 signals: rules-based only (SQL/Python aggregates, deterministic classification)

## Ingestion model
- Polling (Fujiwa, ≤15 min reconciliation) + Phase 2 webhook catalog (#354)
- Polling remains authoritative backstop
